requirement_topic.en: Marking — EN 149 Identity and UNBS Q-Mark Visibility
requirement_topic.zh: 标识——EN 149身份标识与UNBS Q标可见性
requirement_topic.zht: 標識——EN 149身份標識與UNBS Q標可見性

summary.en: For Uganda, EN 149-aligned models must carry marking that clearly identifies class, model, manufacturer, and tested route. Q-Mark presentation is expected where the product falls under UNBS quality-traceability expectation. If the model includes powered or radio functions, mark declarations must align with Uganda import declarations including 240 V and 50 Hz references where applicable.
summary.zh: 面向乌干达市场，采用EN 149的型号需有清晰的等级、型号、制造商及检测路径标识。对于适用UNBS质量追溯体系的产品，应呈现Q标。若型号具有电源或无线功能，标识声明还需与乌干达用途声明一致，并在适用时体现240 V、50 Hz。
summary.zht: 面向烏干達市場，採用EN 149的型號需有清晰的等級、型號、製造商及檢測路徑標識。對於適用UNBS質量追溯體系的產品，應呈現Q標。若型號具有電源或無線功能，標識聲明還需與烏干達用途聲明一致，並在適用時體現240 V、50 Hz。

standards_or_laws: UNBS product marking interpretation for EN 149-based respirator imports
UNBS Q-Mark visibility expectations for regulated commodities
Product declaration consistency for power and accessory statements

summary.en: GB 2626 product marking and Chinese domestic marking language are typically CN-focused, with KN terminology and domestic traceability fields. CCC mark presence supports domestic entry but does not provide the Uganda-facing mark layer required for Q-Mark and UNBS route documents.
summary.zh: GB 2626标识和国内标识语言主要面向中文市场，使用KN术语和国内追溯字段。CCC标识支持国内流通，但不能替代乌干达所需的Q标和UNBS路径标识要求。
summary.zht: GB 2626標識和國內標識語言主要面向中文市場，使用KN術語和國內追溯字段。CCC標識支持國內流通，但不能替代烏干達所需的Q標和UNBS路徑標識要求。

standards_or_laws: China CCC mark and traceability practice

gap.en: The key marking gap is market-fit conversion. Exporters should replace CN-only KN markings with Uganda EN 149 model-identifiers in the filing model, display route-aligned quality symbols such as UNBS Q-Mark when required, and keep power/radio-related marking consistent with Uganda declarations.
gap.zh: 关键标识差距是市场适配转换。出口商需将中国CN为主的KN标识替换为乌干达申报模型对应的EN 149型号识别，同时在需要时补充UNBS Q标，并确保电源/无线相关标识与乌干达申报一致。
gap.zht: 關鍵標識差距是市場適配轉換。出口商需將中國CN為主的KN標識替換為烏干達申報型號對應的EN 149識別，同時在需要時補充UNBS Q標，並確保電源／無線相關標識與烏干達申報一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — market-accurate EN 149 model marking and UNBS quality symbol alignment are required for accepted import documentation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 2626 marking and CCC mark are mandatory for domestic Chinese market flows where applicable.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uganda-facing marking must match the UNBS-adopted EN 149 model route and include route-appropriate quality visibility such as UNBS Q-Mark. CN-only KN labels and domestic-only traceability marks are generally insufficient.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 向乌干达合规的标识应与UNBS采用的EN 149型号路径一致，并包含UNBS Q标等目的地可见质量信息。仅CN KN标识及国内追溯标志通常不足。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 向烏干達合規的標識應與UNBS採用的EN 149型號路徑一致，並包含UNBS Q標等目的地可見質量資訊。僅CN KN標識及國內追溯標誌通常不足。
